title: artemisia maikara
intro: Artemisia maikara is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to Central Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Artemisia maikara include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, making it a potential treatment for various conditions, including respiratory infections and skin issues. In traditional medicine, Artemisia maikara is prepared as a tea or tincture, and also used in herbal infusions and topical applications.
